tasks.label: Run LapLog paired simulators
tasks.command:
set -euo pipefail
xcodebuild -project LapLog.xcodeproj -scheme 'LapLog Companion' -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17 Pro with Apple Watch,OS=26.3.1' -derivedDataPath .derived-sim CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
xcrun simctl boot 'iPhone 17 Pro with Apple Watch' >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
xcrun simctl install 'iPhone 17 Pro with Apple Watch' "$PWD/.derived-sim/Build/Products/Debug-iphonesimulator/LapLog Companion.app"
xcrun simctl install 'Apple Watch Ultra (49mm)' "$PWD/.derived-sim/Build/Products/Debug-watchsimulator/LapLog.app"
xcrun simctl launch 'iPhone 17 Pro with Apple Watch' com.laplog
xcrun simctl launch 'Apple Watch Ultra (49mm)' com.laplog.watchapp
